_comment: MCP servers configured at user scope via `claude mcp add --scope user`. This is a template only — actual config lives in ~/.claude.json (not committed). Run each command with env vars exported to configure.

_commands.atlassian: claude mcp add --scope user --transport http atlassian https://mcp.atlassian.com/v1/mcp
_commands.contentful: claude mcp add --scope user contentful -e 'CONTENTFUL_MANAGEMENT_ACCESS_TOKEN=${CONTENTFUL_MANAGEMENT_TOKEN}' -e 'SPACE_ID=${CONTENTFUL_SPACE_ID}' -e 'ENVIRONMENT_ID=master' -- npx -y @contentful/mcp-server
_commands.github: claude mcp add --scope user --transport http github https://api.githubcopilot.com/mcp/ --header 'Authorization: Bearer ${GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN}'
_commands.newrelic: claude mcp add --scope user --transport http newrelic https://mcp.newrelic.com/mcp/ --header 'api-key: ${NEWRELIC_API_KEY}'
_commands.context-mode: claude mcp add --scope user context-mode -- context-mode

_notes.secrets: Use only ${VAR} placeholders. Do not hardcode token values.
